Title: Improving prediction of phenotypic drug response on cancer cell lines using deep convolutional network
Mechanism:
Drug: 1D CNN (x3)
Genomic: 1D CNN(x3)
Prediction: CNN output contcat -> FC layers(1024->1024->1024) -> normalized ln(IC50)
*dropout=0.5
*SMILES code를 one-hot encoding해서 drug input으로 사용
*735개의 mut or cnv -> 정상이면 0, 아니면 1 -> genomic data input으로 사용

Title: Predicting Drug Response and Synergy Using a Deep Learning Model of Human Cancer Cells
Author: Kuenzi, Brent M., et al.
Mechanism:
Drug: Morgan Fingerprint(1024dim) -> FC layers(100->50->6 dim)
Genomic: hierarchical GO -> … -> 6 dim
Prediction: concat(12dim) -> AUC
*RLIPP score
*약 3,000개 gene의 non-synonymous mutation 유무에 따라 0 or 1

Title: HiDRA: Hierarchical Network for Drug Response Prediction with Attention
Author: Jin, Iljung, and Hojung Nam.
Mechanism:
Drug: Morgan Fingerprint (512 dim)
Genomic: hierarchical attention (gene, pathway)
Prediction: concat -> several FC layers -> ln(IC50)
*gene 별 expression을 input으로 사용
*attention 사용, attention Query에 drug embedding이 concat해서 들어감

Title: Graph Convolutional Networks for Drug Response Prediction
Author: Nguyen, Tuan, et al.
Mechanism:
Drug: Graph Convolutional Network -> FC layer (128 dim)
Genomic: 1D CNN (x3) -> FC layer (128 dim)
Prediction: concat(256dim) -> FC layer(1024dim) -> FC layer(256dim) -> normalized IC50
*saliency map
*drug structure를 graph로 만들어서 input으로 사용
*735개의 mut or cnv -> 정상이면 0, 아니면 1 -> genomic data input으로 사용
